---
title: "Budget Report 2025-26"
author: "Ministry Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  word_document
---

```{r load_libraries, echo=FALSE}

library(here)
library(flextable)
library(dplyr)
library(systemfonts)
library(officer)
```

```{r table3}


## Operating table

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "NikoshBAN")

df <- readRDS(here("data/final/table3.rds"))

df$ratio_exp <- df$ratio_exp*100

# add an average row below

df <- df %>%
  add_row(
    year = "গত ৫ বছরের গড় সক্ষমতা",
    budget = NA,
    corrected = NA,
    actual = NA,
    ratio_exp = mean(df$ratio_exp, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ft <- flextable(df)


# add header row

ft <- delete_part(x = ft, part = "header")


ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("অর্থ বছর",
             "মূল বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "সংশোধিত বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "প্রকৃত ব্যয়",
             "ব্যয়ের শতকরা হার (%) (সংশোধিত বরাদ্দ)"
            ),
  colwidths = rep(1, 5))

ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("পরিচালন"
             ),
  colwidths = c(5))




ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "header"
)

ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "body"
)



ft <- colformat_double(
  x = ft,
   j = 2:4,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = "," # Optional: adds a comma for thousands separator
)

ft <- colformat_double(
  ft,
  j = 5,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = ",",
  suffix = "%"
)

ft



```

```{r table6}

## Development table

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "NikoshBAN")

df <- readRDS(here("data/final/table6.rds"))

df$ratio_exp <- df$ratio_exp*100

# add an average row below

df <- df %>%
  add_row(
    year = "গত ৫ বছরের গড় সক্ষমতা",
    budget = NA,
    corrected = NA,
    actual = NA,
    ratio_exp = mean(df$ratio_exp, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ft <- flextable(df)


# add header row

ft <- delete_part(x = ft, part = "header")


ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("অর্থ বছর",
             "মূল বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "সংশোধিত বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "প্রকৃত ব্যয়",
             "ব্যয়ের শতকরা হার (%) (সংশোধিত বরাদ্দ)"
            ),
  colwidths = rep(1, 5))

ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("উন্নয়ন"
             ),
  colwidths = c(5))




ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "header"
)

ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "body"
)



ft <- colformat_double(
  x = ft,
   j = 2:4,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = "," # Optional: adds a comma for thousands separator
)

ft <- colformat_double(
  ft,
  j = 5,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = ",",
  suffix = "%"
)

ft



```

```{r table4}

set_flextable_defaults(font.family = "NikoshBAN")

df <- readRDS(here("data/final/table4.rds"))

df$ratio_budget <- df$ratio_budget*100
df$ratio_corrected <- df$ratio_corrected*100


# add an average row below

df <- df %>%
  add_row(
    year = "গত ৫ বছরের গড় সক্ষমতা",
    budget = NA,
    corrected = NA,
    actual = NA,
    ratio_budget = mean(df$ratio_budget, na.rm = TRUE),
    ratio_corrected = mean(df$ratio_corrected, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ft <- flextable(df)


# add header row

ft <- delete_part(x = ft, part = "header")


ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("অর্থ বছর",
             "মূল বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "সংশোধিত বাজেট বরাদ্দ",
             "প্রকৃত ব্যয়",
             "ব্যয়ের শতকরা হার (%) (বাজেট)",
             "ব্যয়ের শতকরা হার (%) (সংশোধিত বরাদ্দ)"
            ),
  colwidths = rep(1, 6))

ft <- add_header_row(
  ft,
  values = c("বিভাগের বাজেট"
             ),
  colwidths = c(6))




ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "header"
)

ft <- font(
  ft,
  fontname = "NikoshBAN",
  part = "body"
)



ft <- colformat_double(
  x = ft,
   j = 2:4,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = "," # Optional: adds a comma for thousands separator
)

ft <- colformat_double(
  ft,
  j = 5:6,
  digits = 2,
  big.mark = ",",
  suffix = "%"
)

ft




```
